display.name: Suksma - uninitialized variabowl
display.author: Suksma
display.blurb: Organic shapes bloom and unfurl like time-lapse vegetation.

annotation.technical_notes: A central singularity acts as the origin for a complex per-pixel warp field, driving a fluid, folding reaction-diffusion aesthetic. High-frequency transients in the music trigger a fan of custom wave particles at the center, while bass kicks modulate the zoom and feedback loop via sampler_main. A pronounced chromatic split is visible along the edges of the warped color fields, creating a highly saturated, metallic sheen.
